# noosphr

> noosphr specialises in Trust & Safety, EU AI Act compliance, and agentic AI systems. Built by practitioners who've run the operations: Trust & Safety at TikTok and Meta, and Procurement across Europe.

noosphr was founded by Petra Mifka and Eugen Müller — operators who became AI engineers. Combined, they bring 20+ years of hands-on experience: Trust and Safety at scale (TikTok, Meta) and enterprise procurement (TeamViewer, Scout24, Delivery Hero). We do not produce strategy decks. We ship working systems: guardrails, governance infrastructure, agentic pipelines, and compliance builds.

## Founders

**Petra Mifka** — Co-Founder
10+ years leading Trust and Safety at TikTok and Meta, including a 600+ FTE organisation across EMEA. Expert in EU AI Act compliance, guardrail design, harm taxonomy, and responsible AI governance.
Website: https://petramifka.com
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/petra-mifka

**Eugen Müller** — Co-Founder
10+ years running procurement and category management at TeamViewer, Scout24, and Delivery Hero. Expert in agentic AI build, enterprise automation, and process optimisation.
GitHub: https://github.com/eugnmueller-87
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/eugen-mueller

## Services

- **Trust & Safety at Scale**: AI-augmented harm taxonomies, governance frameworks, crisis response, and DSA-compliant QA operations. Built by people who've run 600+ FTE T&S organisations.
- **EU AI Act & Compliance Build**: Annex III classification, FRIA writing, and compliance infrastructure built to survive an audit. 2026 obligations are already in force.
- **Agentic AI Systems**: Design and deploy multi-step AI agent pipelines using Claude API, n8n, LangChain, and Pinecone. Built for production, not demos.
- **Process Optimisation with AI**: Workflow redesign for AI augmentation, from RFP automation to QA and supplier triage.

## Projects (Open Source)

- **TrueSpend** — AI-native procurement operating system: https://github.com/eugnmueller-87/TrueSpend
- **Pantheon** — 8-agent autonomous trading system for German equity markets: https://github.com/eugnmueller-87/Pantheon
- **Icarus** — Personal AI operating system with multi-agent coordination: https://github.com/eugnmueller-87/Personal-Assistent
- **Metabelly** — Automated customer support triage for e-commerce: https://github.com/eugnmueller-87/Metabelly

## Key Facts

- Location: Berlin, Germany
- Focus: Trust & Safety, EU AI Act compliance, Agentic AI
- Combined experience: 20+ years
- T&S organisation led: 600+ FTE across EMEA
- AI systems shipped: 7+
- Regulatory expertise: EU AI Act, DSA, GDPR
